script.output: FourOhFourRequest: HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 11:22:42 GMT Content-Type: text/html Content-Length: 1121 Connection: close <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <base href="/login/"> <meta charset="utf-8"> <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=.85"> <meta http-equiv="pragma" content="no-cache"> <title>Error</title> <link rel="shortcut icon" type="image/x-icon" href="images/favicon.ico"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/bootstrap.min.css"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/latofonts.css"> <!-- IE10 viewport hack for Surface/desktop Windows 8 bug --> <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/ie10-viewport-bug-workaround.css"> <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/error.css"> <!--[if lt IE 9]> <script src="js/html5shiv.min.js"></script> <script src=" GetRequest: HTTP/1.1 302 Found Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 11:22:42 GMT Content-Type: text/html; service.name: telnet
service.product: APC PDU/UPS devices or Windows CE telnetd

script.output: GenericLines: telnet@engineering> telnet@engineering> telnet@engineering> GetRequest: telnet@engineering>GET / HTTP/1.0 Invalid input -> GET / HTTP/1.0 Type ? for a list telnet@engineering> telnet@engineering> Help: telnet@engineering>HELP Invalid input -> HELP Type ? for a list telnet@engineering> NCP, NULL, tn3270: telnet@engineering> RPCCheck: telnet@engineering>(r
script.elem: telnet@engineering> telnet@engineering> telnet@engineering>
telnet@engineering>GET / HTTP/1.0 Invalid input -> GET / HTTP/1.0 Type ? for a list telnet@engineering> telnet@engineering>

telnet@engineering>(r

osmatch.name: Cisco M670 Content Security Management appliance (AsyncOS 8.1.1)
